description: Ground truth validity labels for STL fixture files used in verifier scoring.

cases.notes: Clean tetrahedron — all four face normals match vertex winding order, closed mesh.
Faces 3 and 4 have declared normals opposite to their vertex winding order. Invalid for manufacturing. A naive validator that does not check normal consistency will incorrectly report this as valid.
Missing the hypotenuse face — leaves 3 open boundary edges. Not a closed solid.
